diagrams.title: Resolution Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how two parent clauses combine through resolution to produce a resolvent
diagrams.purpose: Understanding binary resolution operation in propositional and predicate logic

diagrams.title: Resolution Refutation Proof Tree
diagrams.description: Tree structure showing step-by-step derivation of empty clause from negated theorem
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing proof by contradiction and understanding proof search

diagrams.title: Unification Process
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how MGU is computed by matching predicate arguments
diagrams.purpose: Understanding step-by-step unification and MGU computation

diagrams.title: CNF Conversion Pipeline
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential transformation from first-order formula to clause set
diagrams.purpose: Remembering the complete CNF conversion procedure step by step
